289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

411.issue_title: refactor: Resolve decorator pipeline technical debt and deferred items

cycles.name: C_BOOTSTRAP.1

deliverables.description: Create mcp_server/__main__.py with process startup main()
Clean up inline imports in bootstrap.py and convert to module-level static imports

cycles.exit_criteria: MCPServer startup and initialization runs without using inline imports in bootstrap.py.

cycles.name: C_CACHE.2

deliverables.description: Define custom Pydantic HexUUID validation type and apply to CachePublication run_id
Remove URI parsing/normalizing logic from ResponseCache and enforce HexUUID keys
Implement URI validation and extraction at CachedResponseResource API boundary
Update tests to use valid hex run_ids rather than reading configs

cycles.exit_criteria: ResponseCache is completely agnostic of URI schemes and uses raw hex UUIDs. API boundary handles normalization.

cycles.name: C_PRESENTER.3

deliverables.description: Add category and emojis properties to presentation config schema and configure presentation.yaml
Refactor TextPresenter to look up category emojis dynamically from config
Remove static category class variables from tool classes

cycles.exit_criteria: Presentation categories and emojis are fully dynamic and loaded from presentation.yaml.

cycles.name: C_ENFORCEMENT.4

deliverables.description: Add categories property to EnforcementConfig and configure enforcement.yaml
Update EnforcementRunner to check category rules dynamically
Remove hardcoded exempt tool action types from enforcement_config.py

cycles.exit_criteria: Policy enforcement categories are dynamic and loaded from enforcement.yaml. Tool subclass files contain zero static category variables.

cycles.name: C_SCAFFOLD.5

deliverables.description: Add context_class to ArtifactDefinition and configure artifacts.yaml
Refactor ArtifactManager to resolve context classes dynamically and remove v2 registry
Clean up and rename legacy v2 variables and strings to neutral terminology

cycles.exit_criteria: Artifact manager context registry is dynamic and all v2 naming is cleaned up.

cycles.name: C_LABELS_PHASES.6

deliverables.description: Remove legacy 4th fallback validation step from label_config.py
Update project_tools.py to query phase keys dynamically from WorkphasesConfig
Delete obsolete _known_phase_keys set from project_manager.py

cycles.exit_criteria: Legacy fallback regex label validation check is removed and project phase keys are queried dynamically.

cycles.name: C_CLEANUP.7

deliverables.description: Delete obsolete mcp_server/tools/base.py
Remove references to mcp_server.tools.base in code and test comments

cycles.exit_criteria: Obsolete base.py file deleted and comments/references cleaned up, ensuring zero test remnants.
